message:
fix: renumber exhibits 1-21 (no gaps), wire WASM to all exhibits

- Renumbered all 21 exhibits sequentially (was 1,3,5,6,8,10-14,
  16-20,22-27 → now 1-21)
- Region Tree (Exhibit 2): now creates real WASM runtime with scope
  hierarchy (root/http/db/reqA/reqB/conn + 6 tasks). cancelRegion
  closes real WASM handles. resetRegionViz closes old runtime.
- Outcomes (Exhibit 3): selectOutcome now creates a real task and
  joins it with the selected outcome type via real WASM.
- Cancel Protocol (Exhibit 4): triggerCancel spawns 3 real WASM
  tasks and cancels/joins them on staggered timers.
- Updated meta tags: 15 → 21 exhibits.
- Zero simulation code remains. All 21 exhibits use real WASM.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
